tasks.subject: Task 1 (#53): ChannelLogoResolver helper

Internal static ChannelLogoResolver (LogoRoute const, IsLocalPath, ResolveDisplayUrl) + tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Service/ChannelLogoResolver.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/Service/ChannelLogoResolverTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test -c Release --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~ChannelLogoResolverTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["IsLocalPath classifies http/local/null/empty", "ResolveDisplayUrl proxies local, passes http, handles trailing slash/null/empty"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2 (#53): ChannelLogo proxy endpoint
tasks.description:
GET ChannelLogo/{streamId} in LiveTvController serves local override logo file; 404 otherwise. + CLAUDE.md row + tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Api/LiveTvController.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/Api/LiveTvControllerTests.cs", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test -c Release --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~LiveTvControllerTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no override → NotFound", "http logo → NotFound", "existing local path → file+content-type", "missing path → NotFound", "warning-clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3 (#53): Rewrite local logos in M3U + XMLTV
tasks.description:
LiveTvService: inject IServerApplicationHost; rewrite tvg-logo/icon to proxy URL; expose ResolveChannelLogoUrl; update 3 test ctor sites; LiveTvServiceTests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Service/LiveTvService.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/Api/SyncControllerTests.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/Service/XtreamTunerHostTests.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/Service/LiveTvServiceTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test -c Release --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~LiveTvServiceTests|FullyQualifiedName~SyncControllerTests|FullyQualifiedName~XtreamTunerHostTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ctor takes IServerApplicationHost", "M3U+XMLTV proxy local logos", "ResolveChannelLogoUrl works", "existing tests pass"]}
```
